title: Archived Science and Research - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived Science and Research
On the Health Canada Web site, each navigation section (listed in the left-hand column of the screen) has its own Contact Us page. For contact information for sections other than Science and Research, view the Main Contact Us page.
Choose any of the following for contact information relating to Science and Research :
- Health Canada Science Forum
- Natural Health Products Research Program
- Policy Research Communications Unit for the Health Policy Research Bulletin
- Research Ethics Board
- Science Advisory Board
